items.raw_desc: Ébresztőóra TFA 60.2552.01 BINGO:Hétalvó vagy és nehezen ébredsz fel? Akkor biztosan ki fogod használni a digitális ébresztőórát az elsőrangú TFA  márkától, amely nem hagyja, hogy elaludj. A pontos idő mellett a hét napját is kijelzi. items.raw_desc: Szervízkészlet Sixtol Sada pro podtlakové/vakuové testování brzdových systémů Mechanic Brake Tester 22:The MECHANIC BRAKE TESTER 22 SIXTOL 22-piece service set for vacuum/pressure testing of brake systems is an important tool for the diagnosis and maintenance of brake systems in various types of vehicles. This kit allows you to perform vacuum/vacuum tests to detect potential brake system problems such as cracked hoses, leaks, or brake booster failures. The kit includes a metal pump with pressure gauge, two long elastic hoses, three short elastic hoses, two reservoirs for operating fluids, two caps and a set of clamps and connectors. This kit is used to test the pressure and vacuum of the vacuum solenoid valve, MAP sensors, fuel tank and brake bleeding systems. The tools are stored in a plastic case for easy storage and transport.
